title: selaginella alutacea var. curtisii
intro: Selaginella alutacea var. curtisii, also known as the Australian spike moss, is a type of small, evergreen plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Selaginella alutacea var. curtisii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
